parse.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with non-empty HTML and baseUri returns Document with correct baseUri
parse.expectedResult: Document returned; document.html() equals input HTML wrapped in html/body; document.baseUri() equals provided baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parse non-empty html and baseUri

parse.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with empty HTML returns empty body and retains baseUri
parse.expectedResult: Document returned; document.body().html() is empty string; document.baseUri() equals provided baseUri

parse.description: parse(String html, Parser parser) uses empty baseUri when no baseUri provided
parse.expectedResult: Document returned; document.body().html() equals html; document.baseUri() equals empty string
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O2 parse with custom parser and no baseUri

parse.expectedResult: Document returned; document.body().html() equals html; document.baseUri() equals empty string

parse.description: parse(InputStream in, String charsetName, String baseUri) with valid stream returns Document
parse.precondition: InputStream in contains bytes for "B"; DataUtil.load resolves stream to Document
parse.expectedResult: Document returned; document.body().html() equals "B"; document.baseUri() equals provided baseUri
pseudocode: InputStream in = new ByteArrayInputStream("B".getBytes()); String charset = "UTF-8"; String base = "base";

parse.description: parse(URL url, int timeoutMillis) with unsupported protocol throws MalformedURLException
pseudocode: TEST TC09_O7 parse URL unsupported protocol
URL url = new URL("ftp://example.com"); int timeout=1000;

parse.description: parse(URL url, int timeoutMillis) with valid HTTP URL returns Document
parse.precondition: URL url = new URL("http://example.com"); live connection disabled via stub
parse.expectedResult: Document returned; fetched Document equals stubbed Document
parse.precondition-stub: HttpConnection.connect(url) stubbed to return Connection stub with get() returning Document stub
pseudocode: TEST TC10_O7 parse URL HTTP with stub
URL url = new URL("http://example.com"); int timeout=500; // stub behavior
